_meta.metric: number of businesses with a ready, owner-approved sales dossier
_meta.scope_locked: 6 dimensions A-F; anti-mock [FACT]/[EST], never guessed point numbers; revenue = ranges with visible premises; $0-first self-hosted Contabo; deep on 1-2 Cuiaba niches first; owner approves via reused Brain HITL gate; feeds Geronimo + Vuecra
_meta.poc_business: Clube dos Bichos (veterinaria + pet shop, Cuiaba-MT)

ground_truth_corrections: MCP servers are TypeScript/Node (src/, package.json, tsconfig.json) — template mcps/hermes-control/. NOT Python.
core/web_audit.py does not exist — audit logic in core/pipeline.py (audit_pending) + api/audit.py which proxies to VM. Heavy fetch/scrape = VM-only; PC orchestrates+stores (BLACKLIST R2).
INTENT_REGISTRY locked at exactly 6 (D3) — cobaia uses separate registry via startswith fast-path. Diagnosis follows same separate-registry pattern, NOT mutating the 6.
Daemon uses integer priority on Task dataclass + TaskCategory enum; AUDIT=5. No literal P0-P7 method slots.
brain/safety.py confidence threshold is 0.5 not 0.75 — don't change global; add dossier-specific 0.75.

global_gates_every_phase.blacklist_r2: no direct import of linkedin/* or scraper modules; all scraping via mcp.diagnosis.* -> gateway dispatch; scrape/browser VM-only
global_gates_every_phase.pytest_green: phase tests + existing suite, no regression in tests/test_brain_golden.py
global_gates_every_phase.zero_cost: no paid API key in .env for that phase; all sources free
global_gates_every_phase.anti_mock_proof: every acceptance test runs against Clube dos Bichos and asserts every number carries [FACT] or [EST], never a bare point number

phases.name: Foundation: schema + tagger + separate intent registry
phases.goal: durable substrate before any dimension; the spine, no data yet
build: core/state.py init_db idempotent migration (prospects dossier_* cols + dossier_runs table)
core/dossier_tagger.py (DossierTagger.tag_metric, FACT/EST/NEEDS-TOOL/NO-DATA, confidence rollup, anti-mock invariant raises on untagged bare number)
brain/diagnosis_intent.py DIAGNOSIS_INTENT_REGISTRY + startswith hook in brain/decide.py
phases.acceptance: init_db() twice = no error; tag_metric(4371, ig_raw_html, 1.0)->FACT; tag_metric('~R$150', benchmark, 0.5)->EST; tagger raises on untagged bare number; insert+read a real Clube dos Bichos row

phases.name: Diagnosis MCP skeleton + gateway wiring
phases.goal: TS MCP exposing 6 tool stubs, registered in gateway, dispatchable by Brain — prove the pipe end-to-end
build: mcps/diagnosis-engine/ (TS, copy hermes-control scaffold): presence_audit, seo_audit, competitor_analysis, keyword_research, organic_strategy, revenue_projection
phases.acceptance: decide(intent=audit_diagnosis, {Clube dos Bichos, veterinaria, Cuiaba}) returns 6 keys each [NEEDS-TOOL] (honest, not fake); brain_runs row persisted
gates: BLACKLIST R2 grep zero direct scraper imports

phases.name: Dimension A — Presence/social/ads/pixel
build: httpx+regex pixel/GTM/social via VM api/audit proxy
phases.acceptance: reproduces POC: 2 IG accounts + counts FACT, GTM ids FACT, Meta Pixel ABSENT FACT, ad libraries NEEDS-TOOL, creatives NO-DATA

phases.name: Dimension B — SEO/Google position
phases.acceptance: reproduces POC: title/canonical/Rank Math FACT, schema-gap detection FACT, #1-2 local rank FACT, CWV NEEDS-TOOL

phases.name: Dimension C — Competitive + Places free-tier rating
build: wire Google Places free-tier API for exact ratings (reuse prospects google_rating/google_reviews + source=google_maps path)
phases.acceptance: Vivet ~17K / HVCM ~10K IG FACT; target+rival Google rating now FACT via Places (was NEEDS-TOOL); standing EST synth
gates: Places free tier only (owner decision D2)

phases.name: Dimension D — Keywords + AdWords competition
build: volume/CPC as EST ranges (v1); Keyword-Planner-via-Playwright test next (v1.5)
phases.acceptance: Clube ranks '24h' FACT, INVISIBLE on banho-e-tosa FACT; volume EST ranges w/ premise; own prices NO-DATA

phases.name: Dimensions E+F — Strategy + Revenue projection
phases.goal: LLM strategy synthesis + ranged revenue projection
build: core/diagnosis/strategy.py (Ollama synthesis of A-D, all EST)
core/diagnosis/revenue.py (Demand x Capture x Conversion x Ticket; ranges; business OWN prices if published else NO-DATA)
phases.acceptance: strategy all EST; revenue 3 scenarios w/ visible premises; tagger BLOCKS any point-R$ FACT without verifiable source

phases.name: HITL review gate + Dashboard 6-pane viewer
build: dashboard 6-pane page, tag color-coding FACT=blue EST=amber NEEDS-TOOL=grey NO-DATA=red, approve button (reuse existing modal)
phases.acceptance: Clube dossier confidence<0.75 -> needs_review; approve sets dossier_approved_at + locks from auto-re-audit; tags color-coded

phases.name: Geronimo/Vuecra downstream feeds
build: api/dossier_export.py GET /export/geronimo/{id} (sales dossier JSON, tags preserved) + GET /export/vuecra/{id} (site-brief payload)
POST webhooks (GERONIMO_WEBHOOK_URL, VUECRA_WEBHOOK_URL) fired ONLY on dossier_approved_at transition
phases.acceptance: on approval, export endpoints emit tagged JSON; webhook fires only on dossier_approved_at transition (owner decision D5)

open_owner_decisions.q: Keyword volume tier: ship [EST] only (v1) vs invest VM time in Keyword-Planner-via-Playwright (v1.5) now?
open_owner_decisions.rec: ship EST, add Planner next sprint, DataForSEO only if revenue justifies

open_owner_decisions.q: Enable Google Places free tier (kills #1 POC gap)? Free but needs Google Cloud project + key
HITL strictness: auto-approve at confidence>=0.75 & fact_ratio>=0.75 vs review every dossier in Build #1?
open_owner_decisions.rec: review every one during POC niche, then relax

open_owner_decisions.q: Lock veterinaria+pet shop as the only Build #1 niche vs add a 2nd before done?
Fire Geronimo/Vuecra webhooks auto on approval vs keep export manual for Build #1?
open_owner_decisions.rec: manual export for Build #1, auto webhook later

risks: VM scraping fragility (ad libraries + Keyword Planner JS-walled/anti-bot) — tag NEEDS-TOOL, degrade gracefully, never block a dossier on a scrape
Region skew in SERP (POC was US-region) — relative ordering reliable, exact positions need Search Console
Ticket honesty — when business hides prices, ticket is EST until sales call; dossier shows the premise
Confidence 0.75 threshold is a guess — watch first ~20 real dossiers and tune
Places free-tier quota finite — batch + cache ratings, don't re-pull per re-audit
